messages.content: Please put in the missing prepositions in the brackets in the following sentence: Please cable () us your price () a cargo () 8,000 tons () Manganese Ore
Please cable (to) us your price (for) a cargo (of) 8,000 tons (of) Manganese Ore.
Now do the same for this sentence: We would ask you to make () us an offer () 500 bales () Cotton () immediate shipment.
We would ask you to make (to) us an offer (for) 500 bales (of) Cotton (for) immediate shipment.
Please put in the missing prepositions instead of the three dots where necessary in the following sentence: Shipment will be made... Odessa... five weeks... receipt... your order
Shipment will be made to Odessa in five weeks upon receipt of your order.
Now do the same for: Our representative will call... you... five o'clock to-morrow.
Our representative will call on you at five o'clock tomorrow.
Please put in the missing prepositions instead of the three dots where necessary in the following sentence: Our representative will call __ you at five o’clock tomorrow
Our representative will call on you at five o’clock tomorrow.
Please put in the missing prepositions instead of the three dots where necessary in the following sentence: The goods could be shipped... October or November... our option.
The goods could be shipped in October or November at our option.

Please put in the missing prepositions instead of the three dots where necessary in the following sentence: We can supply you... these goods... the price... $25... ton... 1,016 kilograms c.i.f. Manchester.
We can supply you with these goods at the price of $25 per ton, 1,016 kilograms c.i.f. Manchester.
Please put in the missing prepositions instead of the three dots where necessary in the following sentence: ... ... our contract you are to pay... the goods... cash... shipping documents.
According to our contract, you are to pay for the goods in cash upon receipt of shipping documents.
Please put in the missing prepositions instead of the three dots where necessary in the following sentence: The goods are to be shipped... the 31st May... the latest.
The goods are to be shipped by the 31st of May at the latest.

Fill in the missing words and translate the letter into Russian: Thank you... your...... 16 November,... which you enquire... toys imported... Hong Kong. We are... to hear that there is a... for goods... this type... Northern Ireland.
We are... our price list and terms of..., and our catalogue has already been...... separate post.
As you will notice, our prices are extremely..., and since we hold large... of all models... all times, we can promise delivery... a week... receipt... orders.
We hope to... from you soon, and... forward...... business... you.

Thank you for your letter of 16 November, in which you enquire about toys imported from Hong Kong. We are pleased to hear that there is a demand for goods of this type in Northern Ireland.

We are enclosing our price list and terms of payment, and our catalogue has already been sent by separate post.

As you will notice, our prices are extremely competitive, and since we hold large stocks of all models at all times, we can promise delivery within a week of receipt of orders.

We hope to hear from you soon, and look forward to doing business with you.
 
Translation:

Благодарим Вас за Ваше письмо 16 ноября, в котором Вы интересовались игрушками, импортированными из Гонконга. Мы рады услышать, что имеется спрос на товары такого типа в Северной Ирландии.

Мы прилагаем наш прайс-лист и условия оплаты, и наш каталог уже был отправлен отдельной почтой.

Как Вы заметите, наши цены крайне конкурентоспособны, и поскольку мы всегда держим большие запасы всех моделей, мы можем обещать доставку в течение недели после получения заказов.

Мы надеемся услышать от Вас скоро и с нетерпением ждем, когда начнем делать бизнес с Вами.

Exercise 4: Translate into English:

1) Мы можем предложить Вам этот товар по цене 50 долл. США за английскую тонну сиф Копенгаген.
2) Посылаем Вам с этим письмом 2 экземпляра наших Общих условий поставки, в которых изложены наши условия платежа.
3) Мы удовлетворены качеством товара и готовы разместить у Вас заказ, если Ваши цены и условия платежа будут приемлемы.
4) Мы можем отгрузить этот товар из Одессы в течение шести недель по получении Вашего заказа.
5) Согласно условиям договора, Вы должны уплатить за товар наличными против отгрузочных документов.
6) Все запасные части перечислены в спецификации, посланной с нашим письмом от 19 августа.
7) Отгрузка может быть произведена в мае или июне 19... по нашему выбору.
8) До настоящего времени мы не получили от Вас подтверждения нашего предложения от 25 мая и должны поэтому отозвать нашу оферту.
9) Мы держим это предложение открытым до получения от Вас акцепта до 1 сентября текущего года.
10) Подтверждаем получение Вашего письма от 20 мая, в котором Вы акцептируете нашу оферту от 10 мая на 10000 фунтов икры. С сожалением сообщаем Вам, что этот товар продан другому покупателю, поскольку наша оферта была действительна лишь до 16 мая.

1) We can offer you this product at a price of 50 US dollars per English ton c.i.f. Copenhagen.
2) We are sending with this letter 2 copies of our General Terms of Delivery, which set out our payment terms.
3) We are satisfied with the quality of the product and are ready to place an order with you if your prices and payment terms are acceptable.
4) We can ship this product from Odessa within six weeks upon receipt of your order.
5) According to the terms of the contract, you must pay for the goods in cash against shipping documents.
6) All spare parts are listed in the specification sent with our letter dated August 19th.
7) Shipment can be made in May or June 19... at our choice.
8) Until now, we have not received confirmation of our offer of May 25th from you and must therefore withdraw our offer.
9) We keep this offer open until we receive your acceptance by September 1st of this year.
10) We confirm receipt of your letter dated May 20th, in which you accept our offer of May 10th for 10,000 pounds of caviar. Unfortunately, this product has been sold to another buyer, as our offer was only valid until May 16th.
Compose a letter for your firm, who are producers of tinned food products, to an importer overseas. Offer your standard lines and one new product.

Dear Sir/Madam,

We are delighted to inform you that our company, XYZ Foods, specializes in producing high-quality tinned food products. We have been in business for over a decade and have developed a reputation for excellence in our products and customer service.

We would like to present to you our standard lines of tinned foods, including vegetables, fruits, and fish. All of our products are made from the highest quality ingredients and undergo strict quality control measures to ensure their freshness and taste.

In addition to our standard lines, we are excited to introduce to you our new product – tinned seafood cocktail. This delicious combination of shrimp, mussels, and octopus in a light tomato sauce is sure to be a hit with your customers. We have already received great feedback from our local market and believe this product will be popular on an international scale.

We are confident that our range of tinned food products will meet your needs and exceed your expectations. Our prices are competitive, and we offer flexible payment terms to fit your business needs. We guarantee prompt shipment and delivery of our products to your port of choice.

Thank you for considering XYZ Foods as your supplier of tinned food products. We look forward to hearing from you soon and establishing a successful partnership.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

Sales Manager, XYZ Foods
